# Table C. LPSO (P=6, 50×) Leaderboard by Transform (Medians)

| Rank | PCA (Median) | ANOVA (Median) |
|------|--------------|----------------|
| 1 | KNN — 53.2% | MLP — 69.5% |
| 2 | XGBoost — 53.0% | KNN — 68.9% |
| 3 | MLP — 52.9% | XGBoost — 67.4% |
| 4 | SVM (rbf) — 51.2% | SVM (rbf) — 66.3% |

---

## Footnote

LPSO = Leave-P-Subjects-Out with P=6 held-out subjects per fold (balanced 3 alz + 3 cntrl). Results use 50 random folds. Medians computed across folds for each model.

*Generated by `create_table_c_lpso_leaderboard.py`*

---

## Statistical Tests

> All tests use the **best-per-fold** accuracy vector (max HP config per fold).
> Bootstrap CIs use 10,000 resamples, seed=42.
> *Generated by `compute_real_statistics.py` on 2026-03-02*


### Inter-model comparisons (Wilcoxon signed-rank, paired by fold)

Adjacent pairs in the leaderboard ranking for each experiment.

#### ANOVA Random-50 (P=6)

| #1 model | #2 model | Δ median (pp) | 95% CI for Δ | Cliff's δ | Effect | p-value |
|----------|----------|--------------|--------------|-----------|--------|---------|
| MLP | KNN | +1.6 | [-0.4, +5.5] | 0.21 | small | < 0.001 ✅ |
| KNN | XGBoost | +2.2 | [-1.5, +5.6] | 0.13 | negligible | = 0.081 (n.s.) |
| XGBoost | SVM | -1.7 | [-6.2, +1.8] | -0.15 | small | = 0.020 ✅ |

#### PCA Random-50 (P=6)

| #1 model | #2 model | Δ median (pp) | 95% CI for Δ | Cliff's δ | Effect | p-value |
|----------|----------|--------------|--------------|-----------|--------|---------|
| KNN | XGBoost | -0.3 | [-2.8, +4.3] | 0.08 | negligible | = 0.449 (n.s.) |
| XGBoost | MLP | +0.6 | [-4.3, +3.8] | -0.02 | negligible | = 0.478 (n.s.) |
| MLP | SVM | +0.7 | [-2.9, +3.6] | 0.05 | negligible | = 0.432 (n.s.) |

#### ANOVA Uniform-12 (P=6)

| #1 model | #2 model | Δ median (pp) | 95% CI for Δ | Cliff's δ | Effect | p-value |
|----------|----------|--------------|--------------|-----------|--------|---------|
| MLP | SVM | +0.8 | [-6.0, +7.5] | 0.06 | negligible | = 0.424 (n.s.) |
| SVM | KNN | +4.0 | [-5.7, +9.6] | 0.17 | small | = 0.470 (n.s.) |
| KNN | XGBoost | -0.7 | [-4.5, +9.1] | 0.15 | small | = 0.424 (n.s.) |

#### PCA Uniform-12 (P=6)

| #1 model | #2 model | Δ median (pp) | 95% CI for Δ | Cliff's δ | Effect | p-value |
|----------|----------|--------------|--------------|-----------|--------|---------|
| KNN | XGBoost | -0.8 | [-6.6, +7.0] | 0.03 | negligible | = 0.677 (n.s.) |
| XGBoost | MLP | +1.6 | [-8.4, +8.9] | 0.07 | negligible | = 0.910 (n.s.) |
| MLP | SVM | -1.7 | [-11.0, +7.9] | -0.14 | negligible | = 0.622 (n.s.) |

### ANOVA vs PCA pipeline comparison (same folds → Wilcoxon signed-rank)

| Protocol | Δ median ANOVA−PCA (pp) | 95% CI for Δ | Cliff's δ | Effect | p-value |
|----------|------------------------|--------------|-----------|--------|---------|
| Random-50 (P=6) | +15.7 | [+12.7, +19.2] | 0.85 | large | < 0.001 ✅ |
| Uniform-12 (P=6) | +15.9 | [+8.8, +19.8] | 0.83 | large | < 0.001 ✅ |
